template.name: ODE_Model

location.name: id0
location.label: R0' == boundedRateR0() and R1' == boundedRateR1() and R2' == boundedRateR2() and R3' == boundedRateR3() and R4' == boundedRateR4() and R5' == boundedRateR5() and R6' == boundedRateR6() and R7' == boundedRateR7() and R8' == boundedRateR8() and R9' == boundedRateR9() and R10' == boundedRateR10() and R11' == boundedRateR11()

transition.label: R0 = R0Init, R1 = R1Init, R2 = R2Init, R3 = R3Init, R4 = R4Init, R5 = R5Init, R6 = R6Init, R7 = R7Init, R8 = R8Init, R9 = R9Init, R10 = R10Init, R11 = R11Init

query.formula: simulate [<=1200] { R2, R10, R3, R4, R5, R11, R6, R7, R8, R9, R0, R1 } : false
